summary: Designed 42 artifacts (4 universal + 38 domain-specific). 8 are multi-writer with read-modify-write contracts and explicit ownership/merge rules. 27 data flow connections map artifact flow across 12 creative phases. Data flow is acyclic for primary phase chain; self-loops and revision↔beta feedback loop are intentional bounded loops. Covers all 14 subdomains and traces enforcement paths for all 81 invariants including 26 craft tools.
